TJU Awareness Day

We plan to hold a "TJU Promotion Day" at Istanbul Technopark on October 26, 2023. The program will introduce our university and include speeches from both Turkish and Japanese officials. The program will continue with speeches from Turkish and Japanese professors specializing in Energy and Environment, and Earthquake Science and Disaster Management.

**Our program will be broadcast live on our YouTube channel, and the live broadcast link will be announced on our social media accounts in the future.🎥

RSVP is required to physically attend our program:

lcv@tju.edu.tr

❗️

Our quota is limited. Participants who do not notify us via email of their participation status will not be admitted to the hall.❗️
